checks.name: schema_completeness
checks.detail: All required payload fields present including customSections for sync state schema, user mapping, and communication protocols

checks.name: flow_integrity
checks.detail: 3 flows (Asana->GitHub 11 edges, GitHub->Asana 10 edges, error recovery 13 edges) — all properly connected with decision branches

checks.name: trigger_validity
checks.detail: Polling trigger every 2 minutes (*/2 * * * *) — valid cron for real-time bidirectional sync

checks.name: connector_role_alignment
checks.detail: asana (project_tracking), github (source_control), slack (chat_messaging) — all builtins available

checks.name: adoption_question_fitness
checks.detail: 4 adoption_questions added covering Asana project, GitHub repo, Slack channel, and conflict resolution strategy

checks.name: default_value_coverage
checks.detail: Slack channel (#project-sync) and conflict resolution (last_write_wins) have defaults. Asana/GitHub IDs require user input.

checks.name: prompt_quality
checks.detail: Identity 68w, instructions 700w+ with 9-step core loop plus conflict resolution protocol, tool guidance with Asana/GitHub/Slack API endpoints, 3 examples, comprehensive error handling with rate limits

checks.name: safety_scan
checks.detail: 0 critical findings. Optimistic concurrency prevents stale overwrites. Human escalation for ambiguous conflicts.

dimensions.name: Prompt Completeness
dimensions.rationale: Identity 68w, instructions cover 9-step core sync loop with conflict resolution protocol totaling 700+ words, tool guidance with specific Asana/GitHub/Slack API endpoints and methods, 3 examples (create, conflict escalation, phase transition), comprehensive error handling covering rate limits for all 3 APIs.

dimensions.name: Tool-Prompt Alignment
dimensions.rationale: http_request for all 3 APIs with detailed endpoint documentation including Asana opt_fields, GitHub pagination, Slack Block Kit. file_read/file_write for sync state and user mapping. Perfect alignment.

dimensions.name: Trigger Coherence
dimensions.rationale: 2-minute polling interval perfectly matches real-time bidirectional sync requirements. Single trigger drives the complete sync cycle.

dimensions.name: Connector Coverage
dimensions.rationale: All 3 connectors have builtins with matching auth types (Asana PAT, GitHub PAT, Slack bot_token). Setup instructions include specific permission requirements.

dimensions.name: Memory Design
dimensions.rationale: Exceptional memory design: sync ledger with Asana<->GitHub mappings, content hashes for change detection, conflict log for audit, retry queue that survives restarts, and user identity mapping file.

dimensions.name: Error Handling
dimensions.rationale: Per-platform rate limits (Asana 1500/min, GitHub 5000/hr, Slack 1/sec), network failure retry with queue, optimistic concurrency, missing user mapping handling. After 3 consecutive failures, escalates via user_message.

dimensions.name: Use Case Fidelity
dimensions.rationale: 3 flows cover Asana->GitHub sync, GitHub->Asana sync, and error recovery. Each flow has detailed decision nodes for conflict detection and resolution. All prompt workflows mapped.

dimensions.name: Value Clarity
dimensions.rationale: Replaces 4 separate automation workflows with a single reasoning agent. Bidirectional sync with intelligent conflict resolution is a clear, high-value proposition.

dimensions.name: Execution Feasibility
dimensions.rationale: All 3 connectors have builtins. Asana and GitHub PATs are straightforward to generate. Slack bot setup is standard. 2-minute polling is reasonable for the use case.

dimensions.name: Differentiation
dimensions.rationale: Field-level merge, last-write-wins with configurable threshold, human escalation for contradictory changes, persistent retry queue, and content hash change detection. Significantly more intelligent than Zapier/IFTTT rules.

dimensions.name: Variable Necessity
dimensions.rationale: All 4 adoption questions are essential. Project/repo identifiers are required for sync. Conflict resolution strategy is a meaningful user preference.

dimensions.name: Default Quality
dimensions.rationale: Good defaults for Slack channel and conflict resolution. Asana project GID and GitHub repo have no defaults — must be provided. Template cannot function without these.

issues: No adoption_questions existed — connectors need user-specific configuration for Asana project, GitHub repo, and Slack channel

template: Added 4 adoption_questions: asana_project_gid, github_repo, slack_sync_channel, conflict_resolution
